data.body:
[11/18 (Tue) Ban Notice]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Total/Grand Assault.

▶ Total number of players banned: 10
▶ Period: Permanent
▶ More details: forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en…

#BlueArchive
